task_description: Write a method in Dafny that takes in an integer n and finds the sum of the first n even natural numbers that are raised to the fifth power.
verifier_error:
/home/yqc/dafny-synthesis/output-dynamic_13/task_id_271-gpt-4.1-nano-temp_0.5-k_1.dfy(3,23): Error: this symbol not expected in Dafny
  |
3 |     ensures sum == sum k := 1 to n :: (2 * k) ^ 5
  |                        ^

primary_error.message: this symbol not expected in Dafny
primary_error.context: ensures sum == sum k := 1 to n :: (2 * k) ^ 5

repair_strategy.problem_summary: Used invalid summation notation syntax that is not supported in Dafny.

problem_details.what: The code used a mathematical summation notation 'sum k := 1 to n :: (2 * k) ^ 5' in the ensures clause and loop invariant.
problem_details.why: Dafny does not support this mathematical summation syntax. Instead, specifications involving sums must be expressed using recursive functions or other Dafny-supported constructs.
problem_details.how: Define a separate recursive function 'SumEvenPower5' that computes the sum mathematically, and reference this function in the ensures clause and loop invariants instead of using the invalid summation notation.
